name: plc_city_simple_extraction
body: Flying to Denver next Tuesday for the conference. Haven't been since 2019.

name: plc_country_extraction
body: Spent three weeks traveling through Japan in April. Kyoto was the highlight.

name: plc_state_province_extraction
body: Thinking about relocating to Vermont. The cost of living is better and I love the fall foliage.

name: plc_venue_named_theater
body: Saw Wilco at the Riviera Theatre on Saturday. Amazing set — played for almost three hours.

name: plc_natural_feature_lake
body: Rented a cabin near Lake Tahoe for the long weekend. Water was freezing but worth it.

name: plc_neighborhood_extraction
body: Found a great ramen spot in Wicker Park last night. The neighborhood has really changed in ten years.

name: plc_street_address_extraction
body: The new office is at 1455 Market Street, San Francisco. Starting there Monday.

name: plc_landmark_hospital_edge
body: Marcus just started his residency at the Mayo Clinic. He's been working toward that for years.

name: plc_business_as_place_coffee_shop
body: Met Priya at Intelligentsia Coffee in the West Loop. She had good news about the funding round.

name: plc_place_as_meeting_location_edge
body: The city council vote is scheduled for Tuesday at Town Hall. Dana is presenting the proposal.

name: plc_worksAt_place_hospital
body: Dr. Okeke works at Northwestern Memorial Hospital downtown.

name: plc_place_name_looks_like_person_madison
body: The drive through Madison was gorgeous — I forgot how pretty that city is in spring.

name: plc_place_name_looks_like_person_austin
body: We're seriously considering Austin for the expansion — the tech scene there has exploded.

name: plc_place_name_looks_like_person_savannah
body: Spent a long weekend in Savannah. The historic district is stunning.

name: plc_place_name_looks_like_person_florence
body: The art history tour spent four days in Florence. The Uffizi alone was worth the trip.

name: plc_place_name_looks_like_person_sydney
body: Nadia's company is opening an office in Sydney next quarter.

name: plc_place_name_looks_like_person_brooklyn
body: Moved to Brooklyn two years ago. Can't imagine living anywhere else in New York.

name: plc_named_project_concept
body: Finally got sign-off on Project Atlas today. Kicks off in July and runs through Q4.

name: plc_named_event_wedding
body: The Hopkins wedding is in October — we need to book flights soon or the prices will go through the roof.

name: plc_named_event_summit
body: Applied to present at the 2026 Climate Summit in Geneva. Should hear back by end of month.

name: plc_medical_condition_named_health
body: The endocrinologist confirmed Type 2 diabetes today. Starting metformin and making diet changes.

name: plc_named_law_policy
body: The CHIPS Act funding is finally flowing to fabs in Ohio and Arizona. About time.

name: plc_holiday_named_concept
body: Hosting Thanksgiving at our place this year for the first time. Twelve people, two turkeys.

name: plc_named_course_academic
body: Struggling with Bio 201 this semester. The lab reports are brutal but the material is fascinating.

name: plc_named_product_line
body: Switched the whole studio over to the M-Series Mac minis. The performance per dollar is unreal.

name: plc_place_and_concept_same_note
body: The 2026 Climate Summit is being held in Geneva at the Palais des Nations. Tickets are surprisingly easy to get.

name: plc_multi_cities_person_disambiguation
body: Fatima is relocating from Austin to Portland. Her partner Jordan is already there — started work at Intel's Hillsboro campus last month.

name: plc_medical_condition_with_place_edge
body: Referred to the Cleveland Clinic's cardiology department for the atrial fibrillation follow-up.

name: plc_named_project_and_event_dense
body: Project Atlas hits its first milestone at the Q3 all-hands next Friday. Keiko is presenting the roadmap. Venue is the Mercer Hotel ballroom.
